creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Hello, thanks for taking the time to report something but it's very 
unclear what is going on. Please report your issue to freebsd-gnome 
(gnome@) via http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/freebsd-gnome and 
ask around there. I am closing this PR till there is relevant 
information.
